title: leretia poeppigiana
intro: Leretia poeppigiana, also known as Andean angel's trumpet or Devil's trumpet, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leretia poeppigiana include its ability to treat fever, cold, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight infections. Herbal preparations of Leretia poeppigiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
